chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 746 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 06.08.2024 Mr. Abdul Naeem Pirzada, Advocate for the petitioner Mr. Khuda Bux Chohan, Advocate for Respondents/SMC Mr. Shahryar Awan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< Statement has been filed by learned counsel for respondents No.3 to 7, which is taken on record. Such objections have been raised on transferring the pensionery benefits of late Manohar and Indra, whose pensions were already paid to unmarried daughter Rama bearing CNIC No.455504-1010676-4. Per learned counsel for the petitioner after her marriage such pensionery benefits now accrued in favour of the unmarried daughter namely Rati bearing CNIC No.45504-0686779-2. However, after marriage of Rama, such objections have been raised by learned counsel for respondents No.3 to 7. However, the matter is hyper technical. We do not see any cavil in said respondents transferring the pensionery benefits to the petitioner, as admittedly in the same FRC such pensionery benefits were handed-out to Rama. This petition is accordingly disposed of with directions to respondents to forthwith pay all the accrued pensionery benefits / arrears as well as ensure that in future the pensionery benefits are paid to the petitioner in accordance with the rules. Judge Judge ARBROHI
